story.title: Sleep regularity is a stronger predictor of mortality risk than sleep duration (2023)

draft:
I just read a study that suggests sleep regularity is more important than sleep duration when it comes to mortality risk. 
As someone who works in AI, I'm intrigued by the potential applications of this research in predictive modeling. 
Key findings include the impact of irregular sleep patterns on health outcomes. 
What role do you think AI can play in promoting healthy sleep habits?
#AIinHealthcare #SleepResearch #PredictiveModeling
